text.title: Swift Architecture as Tests via Harmonize + Swift Testing Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: add-harmonize-dep
step.action: Add Harmonize SPM dep pinned to exact version.

step.name: author-arch-tests
step.action: Write @Test functions using Harmonize / SwiftSyntax; reference ADR per rule.

step.name: complement-swiftlint
step.action: Verify SwiftLint runs alongside; covers style.
